_note: Block-A reconciliation §2.A.4 + §2.A.5 — LLM pricing keyed by exact model_id. All prices are USD per 1M tokens. The aws_bedrock_premium_multiplier converts the Anthropic list price into the Bedrock-billed price (Bedrock charges a per-request surcharge over the underlying Anthropic rate; the multiplier is applied per-call when the Bedrock provider returns the call). Last refreshed against Anthropic's published rate card on the generated_at timestamp; any change to the rate card (and any swap of the default model_id env var) MUST refresh this file or the cost ceiling becomes inert. CI lint check-llm-pricing.ts asserts every default model_id has an entry.
